content:
I need to count all inheritance (`<|--`) and implementation (`<|..`) relations from the diagrams.

Let me go through them systematically:

From the Core/Interfaces/Plugins section:
1. `Error <|-- APIError`
2. `Error <|-- ValidationError`
3. `Error <|-- FileError`
4. `Error <|-- GitHistoryNotFoundError`
5. `Error <|-- PluginError`
6. `PluginError <|-- PluginInitializationError`
7. `PluginError <|-- PluginConfigError`
8. `PluginError <|-- ToolDependencyError`
9. `PluginError <|-- ParseError`
10. `PluginError <|-- FileSystemError`
11. `IParser <|-- ILanguagePlugin`
12. `Error <|-- ParseError` (in Core_Layer extractors section)
13. `BaseExtractor <|-- ClassExtractor`
14. `BaseExtractor <|-- EnumExtractor`
15. `BaseExtractor <|-- InterfaceExtractor`
16. `BaseExtractor <|-- RelationExtractor`
17. `EventEmitter <|-- ParallelParser`
18. `GlobalConfig <|-- ArchGuardConfig`
19. `ResolveOptions <|-- OutputPathOptions`
20. `PathResolution <|-- ResolvedPaths`

Language plugin implementations:
21. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Cpp)
22. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. CppPlugin`
23. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Go)
24. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. GoPlugin`
25. `IGoAtlas <|.. GoPlugin`
26. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Java)
27. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. JavaPlugin`
28. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Python)
29. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. PythonPlugin`
30. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. TypeScriptPlugin`
31. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Cpp)
32. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Go)
33. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Java)
34. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Python)
35. `RawClass <|-- MergedCppEntity`
36. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. CapabilityGraphBuilder`
37. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. FlowGraphBuilder`
38. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. GoroutineTopologyBuilder`
39. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. PackageGraphBuilder`

```json
{"answer": 39}
```
